title: eburnax pudica
intro: Eburnax pudica, also known as the "Sensitive Plant", is a tropical plant native to South America, characterized by its compound leaves that fold up when touched or disturbed. The plant contains a compound called rotenone, which possesses medicinal properties, such as acting as an insecticide and a natural pesticide. The health benefits of Eburnax pudica include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
